data.body:
Event Preview

Sensei, the Event Story 'From Opera 0068 with Love!' is coming soon!
Please look forward to new looks for some of the Problem Solver 68 members!

* Sensei, the previous post needed an adjustment so we reuploaded it! Sorry, Kayoko 😥😥😥
